items.caption: A collage of four separate photographs related to compressed gas safety. in the top left, there is a row of colorful gas cylinders lined up against a wall. the top right features a black and white icon with a gas canister and a warning symbol. the bottom left shows a collection of gas canisters on a white surface, with one canister labeled "bolt." the bottom right depicts a hand holding a canister over a computer keyboard. the text in the image provides a warning about the dangers of compressed gas, including explosion risks due to pressure, heat, or dropping the container.
